title: Smoky Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender lamb, smoky spices, and a hint of Ukrainian flair.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the lamb cubes in batches until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and potato to the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Return the lamb to the pot and add the smoked paprika, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Pour in the water and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
